goal: Incorporate a quick local pop-up store, hire 1 contractor, and list a campaign with $1500 operational cost.
Launch a paid social media campaign expected to drive significant new traffic, with a proposed budget of $6000.

Plan a cost-cutting initiative across departments without reducing headcount, targeting 15% savings this quarter.
